subcodes.first_line: O my God! I cast my brow in the dust and cover my face with the soil of lowliness, powerlessness and contrition, imploring Thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اللهم یا الهی انی اعفر جبینی و اغبر وجهی بتراب الذل و العجز و الانکسار مبتهلا
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for victory and requital; triumph of the Cause, @prayer for assistance; intercession, @humility; meekness; lowliness
